zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Knoville於1280年出生在英國越可爾斯頓時，她的父親Bewes Knoville40歲，母親Joan de Walerand39歲。她於1294年6月26日與Thomas de Verdun在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1355年在英國英格蘭享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Knoville于1280年出生在英国越可爾斯頓时，她的父亲Bewes Knoville40岁，母亲Joan de Walerand39岁。她于1294年6月26日与Thomas de Verdun在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1355年在英国英格兰享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Knoville was born in 1280, in Whiston, Yorkshire, England, her father, Bewes Knoville, was 40 and her mother, Joan de Walerand, was 39. She married Thomas de Verdun on 26 June 1294, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1355, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Knoville est née en 1280, à Whiston, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Bewes Knoville, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Joan de Walerand, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de Verdun le 26 juin 1294, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1355, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Knoville 1280 in Whiston, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Bewes Knoville 40 und ihre Mutter Joan de Walerand 39. Sie hat am 26. Juni 1294 in Yorkshire, England Thomas de Verdun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1355 im Alter von 75 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Knoville è nata il nel 1280 nel Whiston, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Bewes Knoville, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Joan de Walerand, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato Thomas de Verdun il 26 giugno 1294, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1355, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Knovilleが1280年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウィストンで生まれた時，父Bewes Knovilleは40歳，母Joan de Walerandは39歳であった。1294年6月26日にイギリスヨークシュアイアでThomas de Verdunと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1355年にイギリスイギリスで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Knoville(이)가 1280년 영국 요르크실르 위스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bewes Knoville(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Walerand(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1294년 6월 26일 영국 요르크실르에서 Thomas de Verdun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1355년 영국 잉글랜드에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Knoville nasceu em 1280, em Whiston, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Bewes Knoville, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Walerand, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas de Verdun em 26 de junho de 1294, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1355, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Knoville родилась в 1280 г. в местности уистон, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Bewes Knoville было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Walerand, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Verdun 26 июня 1294 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1355 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Knoville nació en 1280, en Whiston, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Bewes Knoville, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Joan de Walerand, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Thomas de Verdun el 26 de junio de 1294, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1355, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 75 años.
